title: COMMUNITY BUILDING - 211info
text: LEBANON OFFICE COMMUNITY BUILDING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides leadership development, education such as English as a Second Language classes (ESL), financial literacy, and civic engagement. 500 Weldwood Drive Building E Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Members of the Latinx community Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 512-4949 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 512-4949 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties Services: Cultural Transition Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community English as a Second Language * Hispanic/Latino Community Financial Literacy Training * Hispanic/Latino Community Leadership Development * Hispanic/Latino Community Youth Enrichment Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: ARTS AND CULTURE - CELEBRATION OF CULTURES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY EMPOWERMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
